arts.ttl: Midfielder admits he would have preferred Manchester United over Tottenham in Europa League draw
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar captain Jordy Clasie has shared his delight at drawing Tottenham in the Europa League, even if he’d have prepared Manchester United. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the Ziggo Sport following the Europa League draw on Friday. arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson issues advice to Man Utd youngsters - 'You must accept defeat'
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson regularly made use of young talent during his time as Manchester United boss and the iconic figure has issued some words of wisdom about using defeat as a positive

arts.ttl: Journalist explains why Manchester United’s ‘daring’ style could end up benefitting Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Real Sociedad could benefit from Manchester United’s ‘daring’ style under Ruben Amorim when the two sides meet in the Europa League. That’s according to journalist Miguel Ángel Moyá, via El Desmarque, who believes the Spanish side have good prospects against a team who are becoming regular opponents in Europe. arts.ttl: Manchester United can save millions with perfect double transfer for Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: The latest Man United transfer news with two players who could be perfect for head coach, Ruben Amorim, available for free this summer.

arts.ttl: David Moyes reveals latest on Everton injury crisis as 'nine or 10' miss Manchester United clash
arts.sum: Abdoulaye Doucoure is back after suspension, but David Moyes is dealing with an injury crisis of his own

arts.ttl: GRAEME SOUNESS: Stubborn Ruben Amorim's point of principle puts Man United in danger… it gives weak-minded players an easy excuse for losing
arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: Ruben Amorim 's dogged insistence that his style is not for changing only serves as an enormous gift to the weaker-minded of his Manchester United players.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres transfer BOMBSHELL: Chelsea rekindle interest in Man Utd target
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly rekindled their interest in Sporting CP centre forward Viktor Gyokeres amid their search for a new striker this summer. Ipswich Town star Liam Delap is believed to be Chelsea ’s priority target following his immense start to life in the English top flight, although the Blues are also interested in signing Gyokeres, according to GiveMeSport .

arts.ttl: David Moyes made Liverpool joke at press conference as I saw Everton mood transformed
arts.sum: Chris Beesley reflects on David Moyes' pre-match press conference to preview Everton's game against Manchester United

arts.ttl: Everton vs. Man United: Red Devils will be missing nine first-team players for Goodison Park battle
arts.sum: Manchester United will be without nine first-team players for Saturday's Premier League clash with Everton, but the Red Devils receive a triple boost.

arts.ttl: Man Utd handed triple injury boost ahead of Everton clash
arts.sum: Man Utd receive a triple injury boost ahead of the Premier League clash with Everton.
